Event: Magic Training - Flying Hedgehog
Event Date: 23/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI70
Flying Hedgehog Tamer Ring

When attacking an enemy with 50% or less health, the ring wearer splits the target's armor. When the armor is split, that unit takes pure damage equal to 15% of their max health and has their physical and magic armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Also, that enemy takes pure damage equal to 20% of their max health for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
